edgeCases: Gatekeeper Finding 1: specs/add-agent-evidence-contract.feature Scenario 2 stale — prompts now mandate centinela evidence schema not embedded skeleton. Acceptance test enforces this; spec text needs update.
Gatekeeper Finding 2: mobileFirst set in non-UX-specialist evidence files. Schema init may emit the field for all roles. Harmless on disk but violates contract rule 6; corrected in follow-up.
QA edge case: Lock file orphaning after crash; Repair only removes .json.tmp not .lock files. Mitigated by extending Repair; pinned in tests.
QA edge case: extra key collision with future reserved fields; no guard in setExtra. Mitigated by documenting reservation + adding check; deferred to follow-up.
